name: Atlassian CLI (acli)
description: Installs the Atlassian Command Line Interface (`acli`) on Linux. Includes the Rovo Dev agent as the `acli rovodev` subcommand. ACLI's config and credential files live at /home/node/.config/acli, which Monoceros bind-mounts from <container-dir>/home/.config/acli so the login survives `monoceros apply` rebuilds. When `email` and `apiToken` options are provided, the feature performs a non-interactive Rovo Dev login on first start; the site/instance is asked by Rovo Dev itself on first `acli rovodev run`.

email.description: Email address tied to your Atlassian account. Required for non-interactive Rovo Dev login (used together with apiToken).

apiToken.description: Atlassian API token from id.atlassian.com → Security → API tokens. Required for non-interactive Rovo Dev login (used together with email). The site/instance is asked by Rovo Dev itself on first `acli rovodev run` and persisted under /home/node/.config/acli.
